title: MANGA GOS2 How long is Angelic Days Girlfriend of Steel
display_title: MANGA GOS2 How long is Angelic Days Girlfriend of Steel
wikitext:
[]: [GOS2] How long is Angelic Days/Girlfriend of Steel 2?             Quote Post by rei on your parade » Wed Aug 16, 2006 6:52 pm Hey, is the Angelic Days manga still running in Japan, or has it ended? And if it has ended, how many volumes are there?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 16, 2006 7:00 pm I can only confirm the existance of six volumes. The last of which was apparently published last december. I believe that it ended with volume 6, but I cannot confirm it. Just that there were three published in 2004, and three in 2005, and none so far this year. Given that, I believe that it has concluded.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Wed Sep 20, 2006 3:22 am Wonder who got together in it in the end? I predict something like Shinji/Rei, Asuka/Kaworu (check out their bickering in Vol.1 ), Kensuke/Other & Toji/Hikari.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 20, 2006 8:40 am I got volume 6, and it looks like it might have ended there. From the cover art for that volume with Asuka and Shinji holding hands, I think it's fairly obvious who he ends up with.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Sep 20, 2006 9:18 am Where can i buy all the volumes? I have checked online, and i have not found further than vol.3!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 20, 2006 1:38 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Where can i buy all the volumes? I have checked online, and i have not found further than vol.3!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Sep 20, 2006 1:41 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Unless you intend to buy the Japanese versions,

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Wed Sep 20, 2006 2:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I got volume 6, and it looks like it might have ended there. From the cover art for that volume with Asuka and Shinji holding hands, I think it's fairly obvious who he ends up with.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Sep 20, 2006 4:38 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: From the cover art for that volume with Asuka and Shinji holding hands, I think it's fairly obvious who he ends up with.

[]:             Quote Post by zlink64 » Wed Sep 20, 2006 6:34 pm after reading the fist 2 volumes i have a feeling Rei might die again just a hunch

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 21, 2006 8:50 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Unless you intend to buy the Japanese versions, you're going to have to wait a while.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Thu Sep 21, 2006 3:11 pm On reading Vol.2, I think Kensuke/Asuka would make a sweet couple.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 13, 2006 5:56 pm Yeah, it's 6 volumes long, and as the covers of both volume 4 and 6 show, Shinji obviously ends up with Asuka. According to what I read though, apparntly the acutal story ends at volume 4 while volumes 5 and 6 are supposedly just short stories. No idea how valid that is as it was just some fan's words. It would be kinda weird if Rei and Kaworu end up as a couple, though I'm wondering if Volume 3 (it's released already as I have it, Amazon's just stupid with saying it'll be released later this month) is implying that OR of who they "really" (*cough* Lilith and Adam *cough*) are...That seems to be the case with Kaworu-kun, I think. ...I'm considering getting the original Volumes of 4 and or 6, I just don't know if it'd be worth it or not.

[]:             Quote Post by CyborgZeta » Tue Nov 21, 2006 10:26 pm I've gotten my copy of Volume 3 today. I'm curious to how the manga will end. It's supposed to be an "alternate universe/romance shojo", but it seems to have some more serious plot points. Who exactly is Kaworu in this alternate universe? Why does he appear in a class roster 20 years before? Is the EoE ending inevitable?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:14 pm All I know is supposedly 2nd Impact never happened in this world, but in the back of my mind I've been wondering if come volume 6, it ends with Shinji waking up at the LCL Beach. Now THAT would be a mind-fuck! :shock: (And I thought Retake was bad with that! ^^; ) In terms of more serious plot-points, like I said before (guess it was in the other post about Girlfriend of Steel 2!) SPOILER: apparently, Adam (thus Kaworu?? Maybe?) EATS (kinky?? :shock:) Shinji in next volume, 4, /SPOILER so... Yeah. I wonder, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:17 pm WHAT? No 2I yet Adam's soul ends up in Kaworu!? WTF? Who came up with that plot?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:19 pm I have NO idea about Adam's soul in Kaworu, I'm just guessing that if Adam does that, it has to somehow be Kaworu's doing? But I guess we'll see. *shrug*

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:32 pm Maybe Fumino Hayashi never got the "New stuff in NPC #24" memo.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:35 pm I thought the guy drawing/doing this was Fumino Hayashi (spelling?) NOT Sadamoto... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:41 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I thought the guy drawing/doing this was Fumino Hayashi (spelling?) NOT Sadamoto... :?
